title: podman-remote: build: timeout + unexpected EOF [flake]
body:
This one is manifesting as flakes in the `podman exec preserves container groups with --user and --group-add` test, which is awkward because there are *two* other flakes in that test that I don't understand enough to file issues for.

The symptom is:
```
# podman-remote build ...
...
Error: unexpected EOF
Timed out after 120.000s.
Expected process to exit.  It did not.
```
The ones I've confirmed so far:

## Podman exec [It] podman exec preserves container groups with --user and --group-add

* gce_instance:prior-ubuntu : int remote ubuntu-2004 root host
  * PR #9208
    * [02-02 22:32](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6448591940091904/html/int-remote-ubuntu-2004-root-host.log.html#t--podman-exec-preserves-container-groups-with---user-and---group-add--1)
    * [02-02 21:07](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5189050907754496/html/int-remote-ubuntu-2004-root-host.log.html#t--podman-exec-preserves-container-groups-with---user-and---group-add--1)

There's also this one from PR #9514, in `int remote fedora-32 root host`: [log](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5462657635450880/html/int-remote-fedora-32-root-host.log.html#t--podman-exec-preserves-container-groups-with---user-and---group-add--1) (I've manually Re-run this test, and am assuming that it will pass on rerun but it'll take 30 more minutes to find out). The test itself failed three times, but only the first was EOF.

A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

No recent failures in the `Podman exec [It] podman exec preserves container groups with --user and --group-add` test; and the most recent two:

## Podman exec [It] podman exec preserves container groups with --user and --group-add
* gce_instance:prior-fedora : int remote fedora-32 root host
  * PR #9406
    * [02-17 07:57](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5012611033989120/html/int-remote-fedora-32-root-host.log.html#t--podman-exec-preserves-container-groups-with---user-and---group-add--1)
  * PR #9399
    * [02-16 09:37](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6111188036616192/html/int-remote-fedora-32-root-host.log.html#t--podman-exec-preserves-container-groups-with---user-and---group-add--1)

...manifest as the '0 errors occurred' flake (#9379). I wonder if it's the same bug? Closing on the ~~assumption~~ hope that they're the same.
